experiment_card.research_question: Can a long-context LLM method extract reusable trading judgment from messy trader text without losing grounding?
experiment_card.hypothesis: A single controlled long-context read may produce a small set of reusable trading judgment proposals while preserving enough source linkage to identify unsupported or over-abstracted claims.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately approved live run, evaluate only the resulting ArtifactEnvelope records with schema_check and manual_boundary_review for source/privacy containment, proposal-only status, unsupported-claim visibility, and over-abstraction risk. Method quality and trading validity are not evaluated by the planning packet.
